    "pros": "The Plain English Summary is exceptionally clear, with NLP metrics confirming high readability (Flesch-Kincaid 7.33) and low jargon density (4.2%).     "drawbacks": "No material caveats; the evidence is comprehensive and directly addresses all aspects of the track record criterion."
